reason: Successfully tested browser-use feature - agent opened browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved page title "Example Domain", and returned result in chat
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded Gamut home page with agent list displayed
Found and clicked the "QA-20260714-212553-9x84" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened agent chat interface with empty conversation
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed in 13 seconds, response received and displayed in chat

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response confirmed with multiple mentions: "The page title is "Example Domain"" and "The page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain"". All three browser tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) completed successfully with green success indicators.
